3. Title: Électricité
Artist Name: Man Ray

Medium: This remarkably seductive album of photogravures is an exquisite example of his legacy as America's greatest Surrealist photographer...

4. Title: A Wooded River Landscape with a Church and Figures
Artist Name: Hendrick Avercamp
Date: 
Medium: "...His finished drawings are much rarer, and the present one is among his best of an imaginary landscape..."
Image URL: Image for A Wooded River Landscape with a Church and Figures

5. Title: Nineteenth-Century Exhibition Pistols
Artist Name: Gilles Michel Louis Moutier-Le Page
